INSERT INTO public.questions
(id, question_text, stimulus_text, stimulus_type, options, correct_answer, explanation, hint, topic, subtopic, section, domain_id, skill_id, math_skill_code, difficulty, calculator_allowed, exam_type, question_type, is_platform_question, ai_generated, source, source_metadata, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES ('117f2a2d-2d33-48ca-a9ce-ed4242830be6', 'Which choice best describes the overall structure of the passage?', 'Archaeologists at site 21 discovered that pottery shards contained residue of fermented grain, suggesting the community brewed beverages for ritual gatherings rather than daily meals.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"to describe how a discovery was made","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage develops an explanatory arc matching: to describe how a discovery was made."},{"id":"B","text":"to list unrelated facts with no connection","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage connects ideas; it is not a random list."},{"id":"C","text":"to argue that research should be abandoned","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage presents research rather than rejecting it."},{"id":"D","text":"to provide a chronological biography of one person","is_correct":false,"explanation":"No single biography is the focus."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage is organized to describe how a discovery was made, introducing context and then supporting evidence.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Text Structure and Purpose', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'TSP', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

VALUES ('ccd89032-5b76-4854-96f4-7fa49c0e5a25', 'Which choice best describes the overall structure of the passage?', 'Psychologists testing memory task 22 reported that participants who slept eight hours recalled word lists more accurately than those who stayed awake, even when both groups studied equally long.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"to explain a cause-and-effect relationship","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage develops an explanatory arc matching: to explain a cause-and-effect relationship."},{"id":"B","text":"to list unrelated facts with no connection","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage connects ideas; it is not a random list."},{"id":"C","text":"to argue that research should be abandoned","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage presents research rather than rejecting it."},{"id":"D","text":"to provide a chronological biography of one person","is_correct":false,"explanation":"No single biography is the focus."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage is organized to explain a cause-and-effect relationship, introducing context and then supporting evidence.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Text Structure and Purpose', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'TSP', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())

VALUES ('0d2f2073-ee17-487a-b634-aed2458e5011', 'Which choice best describes the overall structure of the passage?', 'Engineers prototyping turbine 23 demonstrated that angled blades harvest more energy from low wind speeds, a design inspired by the shape of humpback whale fins.', 'passage', '[{"id":"A","text":"to compare two responses to a problem","is_correct":true,"explanation":"The passage develops an explanatory arc matching: to compare two responses to a problem."},{"id":"B","text":"to list unrelated facts with no connection","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage connects ideas; it is not a random list."},{"id":"C","text":"to argue that research should be abandoned","is_correct":false,"explanation":"The passage presents research rather than rejecting it."},{"id":"D","text":"to provide a chronological biography of one person","is_correct":false,"explanation":"No single biography is the focus."}]'::jsonb, 'A', 'The passage is organized to compare two responses to a problem, introducing context and then supporting evidence.', NULL, 'Craft and Structure', 'Text Structure and Purpose', 'reading_writing', 'craft', 'TSP', NULL, 'easy', false, 'SAT', 'multiple_choice', true, true, 'scholaris_ai', '{"generator":"scholaris_bulk_v1","original":true,"explanation_v2":true}'::jsonb, now(), now())
